name: Kessoku Band and others
description:
Whole Kessoku Band and Bocchi The Rock! characters in one bot for some freaky (or normal) RP


Actually, I made this bot for personal use but realized that there's no any normal Bocchi The Rock! character except horny shit or just frankly stupid versions of Hitori in really fucked up AUs. And only one barely normal RPG character has no proxy so I decided to do it myself and let that bot be public.
Sooo that bot having almost every main character : Hitori, Nijika, Kita and Ryo. Also PA-san, Kikuri and Seika.


And I also tried to make Hitori's family, but not promising they would act normal.
The scenario is open for any sick fantasy of yall, so do what you want lmao
Tested it with DeepSeek API and JLLM. In my chats - JLLM works more or less bearable. And DeepSeek wrote some real funny banger.



[ENGLISH IS NOT MY FIRST LANGUAGE, SORRY IF THE FIRST MESSAGE LOOKS LIKE ITS WRITTEN BY A LITTLE KID]
creator: Bilbos
